metadata.name: Register for an Employer Identification Number (EIN)

description: A new partnership is forming and needs to obtain an EIN from the IRS.

nodes.task_description: Gather the necessary information about the partnership and the responsible party.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all required data for the application.

nodes.task_description: Complete Form SS-4, Application for Employer Identification Number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately fills out the application form.

nodes.task_description: Submit the application online to receive the EIN instantly.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully obtains the EIN for the new business.
